case_title: FRANCISCO JOSE MARTINEZ VS. SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-11-2024 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL [AGENT FOR SERVICE: CSC LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICES] FILED BY PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO JOSE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARTINEZ, FRANCISCO JOSE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-16-2023 - CONTINUED DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A CERTIFIED SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER TO ASSIST THE PLAINTIFF TO NOV-30-2023 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO JOSE MARTINEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SOUTHWEST AIRLINES CO. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY JESSICA ARMOUR (ADMIN COORDINATOR). MATTER CONTINUED DUE TO THE UNAVAILABILITY OF A CERTIFIED SPANISH-LANGUAGE COURT INTERPRETER TO ASSIST THE PLAINTIFF. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARA SANDBERG; CLERK: S. KANE; NOT REPORTED.
